notes: FAIR-MAST = classic MAST (not MAST-U). FreeGSNKE active circuits are classic only: Solenoid, P2_inner, P2_outer, P3, P4, P5, P6 — no divertors. Measured voltages p1/p2/p4/p5 (V) are primary drive. One FAIR-MAST p2 channel is applied identically to both P2_inner and P2_outer (declared same-V policy). Level-2 coil_voltage has only four channels for reference shot 30201; P3 and P6 stay from_current_ohmic (I×R). 2026-07-19 L1 inventory (configs/l1_voltage_inventory_30201.json): amc has P3/P6 currents only; no public xpc group / XPC_FA DRIVE (intended P6 V in fair-mast-ingestion mast.yml but not published); xma/p6_volts is ~40 mV raw — not usable as PF drive without inventing calibration. Do not invent P3/P6 voltage channels.

Solenoid.notes: PRIMARY measured FAIR-MAST voltage: p1 (zarr attrs link AMC_SOL to /xdc/pf/f/p1); units V → classic Solenoid.

P2_inner.notes: PRIMARY measured FAIR-MAST voltage p2 applied to P2_inner. Same channel also drives P2_outer (declared same-V policy: one Level-2 p2 feeds both classic P2 circuits).

P2_outer.notes: PRIMARY measured FAIR-MAST voltage p2 applied identically to P2_outer (same-V policy with P2_inner; not a second independent voltage channel).

P3.notes: No FAIR-MAST voltage channel for P3 (absent from L2 mapping and L1 amc). Currents P3L+P3U via coil_map. V(t)=sign*scale*I_P3(t)*R_P3 using FreeGSNKE coil_resist after load.

P4.notes: PRIMARY measured FAIR-MAST voltage: p4 → classic P4; units V.

P5.notes: PRIMARY measured FAIR-MAST voltage: p5 → classic P5; units V.

P6.notes: No published measured P6 PF drive voltage (L2 omits XPC_FA DRIVE; L1 xma/p6_volts unusable). Currents P6L+P6U via coil_map. V(t)=sign*scale*I_P6(t)*R_P6 using FreeGSNKE coil_resist after load.
